name: prephub
description: Placement Preparation Hub - Full Stack App

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,STUDENT,ADMIN" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix student-app" "npm run dev --prefix admin-app"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix student-app && npm install --prefix admin-app
scripts.build: npm install --prefix student-app && npm run build --prefix student-app && npm install --prefix admin-app && npm run build:prod --prefix admin-app
